title: jasminum officinale
intro: Jasminum officinale, also known as true jasmine or Arabian jasmine, is a flowering vine native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The health benefits of Jasminum officinale include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and promoting relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal teas and calming remedies. Herbal preparations of Jasminum officinale can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
